reviews.review_description:
Kid named stormy 7_7
 and he had friends and they were telling a kid that to tell her parents that they said a bad word like they told the kids to say bad words in front of their parents, I tried to stop them, but they were joining different groups and different groups over and over ￼ if you don’t stop him, I won’t play this game ￼
Why is no one ever on like I have only played one round and had to leave in the middle of the round and it was 9:15 pm

developer_response.body: Sorry this keeps happening - people have a hard time finding this game.

reviews.review_description:
This is a blast and way easy to play. Definitely great for party vibes. Its so cool that this is free, makes it way easier to convince my friends to play or find a group already.  A friend and I played and laughing by the end.

Very high quality game for what it is, and can't wait to see more out of it. 

I am definitely not an artist, but that's part of the fun :)

developer_response.body: Thanks a million! This means a lot to us!

reviews.review_description: This game has so much potential and is already a great game but the only problem i have is there's no one online to play with when my friends arent on, this either is a bug or people just dont play but either way its great

developer_response.body: Yeah not a lot of people find their way to the game, it's a pity!

reviews.review_title: Needs the Ability to Choose Colors
reviews.review_description:
PLEASE. That one change would make a huge difference. Right now it's so limited that I have no desire to play.

*Can change colors now, but only in the new Quick Paint area? How does that help when I'm in a room, playing the actual game? If you tell me to draw a strawberry, I'd like to be able to switch to red or green, for example. Or is that not the right vision for this game?

developer_response.body: Thanks CeeJay, thanks for the suggestion and it's on the roadmap.

reviews.review_description: best game ever

developer_response.body: Oh woooow! T+Y+S+M !

reviews.review_description: the game seems great but it wont let me join :(

developer_response.body: Thanks a million ! Means a lot! How can we help you? Can you join us on Discord?

reviews.review_description: I caught myself laughing out loud and having fun with the wackiness of this game

developer_response.body: Thanks Michael, glad you had fun.

reviews.review_description:
Great game, but whenever I try to draw in multiplayer it won’t draw and voice chat is off even though it should be on. Also I can’t see anybody else draw.

If this was fixed soon I would love it! :3 bye bye

developer_response.body:
Hey hey! New update is coming soon, this is not supposed to happen!

EDIT: This should all be fixed now! 

Thanks for notifying

w

reviews.review_title: Great game! But there are a couple bugs.
reviews.review_description: This game is honestly really fun, its kind of like gartic phone (with the prompts and drawing) but with a unique twist. But, the servers are not that great, i would suggest adding private servers and fixing the max players (i put 3 max and 8 people joined). But overall this game is great and just needs some bug fixes!

developer_response.body: Hey hey Tarlicc, thanks for the review and we've fixed the bugs in the newest release.

reviews.review_description: There is a massive amount of bugs that make the game unplayable and you cant erase what you draw and cant even change the colour of your strokes.

developer_response.body:
Update: Bugs are gone! Can we get some more stars now? :) Enjoy! 

Oh oh... Sorry you had this experience. But those are not bugs, it's not a painting program, it's Pictionary in VR. So you draw, and the others have to guess, as soon as possible. 

If you want to have a say in how this free game evolves, please join our Discord: 

https://discord.gg/asWuq9GsHp

w

reviews.review_description: This game is really fun and free and also (at least when I played) not very toxic. Though, I did have a problem when loading into quick play matches: All the other players would not be visible except arms which were buggy and for some reason had two arms on each side. Also I couldn’t hear anybody and the colors and player names weren’t showing up on the blackboard.

developer_response.body: Hey! Thanks for reporting - we're working on these bugs! Best thing to do in that case is give it a restart.

reviews.review_title: great fun with family and frie
reviews.review_description:
Hi,

love this and also painting VR, you guys are very creative, like that...

do you have any plans for different languages? not everyone in my family speaks english, but i would live to show them the magic of VR...

developer_response.body: We'll look into this ! Thanks for the kind words, and for spreading the VR love! :)

reviews.review_description: The game is very fun but no players

developer_response.body: Hey hey Noah, glad you think it's awesome :) next time come back in the evening as that's when it's the busiest

reviews.review_description: Very fun but  sometimes I have to join a new lobby because it glitched the sigh didn’t come down no one came have another turn and also sometimes when I join a new lobby l cant talk

developer_response.body: Thanks for your remarks. We're working on this.

reviews.review_description: So every time I launch the game, it shows the door, but then just blacks out with the music still playing! Pls fix it 🙏

developer_response.body:
Hey hey! Thanks for letting us know. First time we hear this. Let's see what we can do. In the meantime, join the Oisoi Discord - https://discord.gg/asWuq9GsHp

That's an invitation ! 

Thanks again.

reviews.review_description: It would be really fun if you could change the color but you can’t

developer_response.body: Now you can - paint freely in the lobby!

reviews.review_description: it's not their fault but there aren't any players but the game has a really good and funny premise

developer_response.body: Hey hey, thanks for the review! Next time come back in the evening as that's when it's the busiest

reviews.review_description: I played with my friend and painting with a chicken head with rain makes a funny outcome

reviews.review_title: Doesn’t work with quest pro controllers
reviews.review_description:
Juvil

BAtan

developer_response.body: It works without controllers! We have handtracking now!

reviews.review_description: Love it! The different types of surfaces and drawing tools keep the rounds very dynamic and fun. Wouldn’t expect less of the developers of Painting VR. You can tell they are artists in real life who have used the tools in real life because they replicate the experience perfectly for VR. I would only suggest the option to ‘hide’ the word that is being drawn for those of us who play with others casting the screen to another device. I also thought it would be fun to stream and play with my followers so they can guess and I can draw but obvs I would need to hide the answer or at least not hve the camera pointing to it as I draw. But regardless of that suggestion the game is top nudge IMO. Keep it up!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the tips! Very helpful!

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun when you and your friends want to play, the chaos mode is by far the best, its so entertaining and competitive trying to guess what your friends drawing on a tv using a chicken! Altogether, this games great but needs a little polishing noise-wise, the voice-based sounds are unique but get repetitive, a potential thing to add which would solve this would be customisable areas that change the objects' voice, e.g: pirate area would sound pirate-esque.

developer_response.body: Hear you on the sounds... let's see where we can squeeze that in... Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
Played this with my friend to test it out, loved the accessories. He immediately wore a hat before we started playing. A complaint we both had was the snap turn if there’s a way to disable that it’d help a lot. I think letting us choose the topics would be fun and more brush options but overall I already think this is rlly fun! He was worried that because I’m an artist it wouldn’t be great to go against me but because I struggled with the tools we both had fun with it.     

My game was a little laggy but I think my internet was just bad— which happens sometimes.

developer_response.body: Yes, internet connection has effect on multiplayer.

reviews.review_description:
We play this as a family and have a lot of laughs.  The randomness of the paint utensils and objects make it hilarious.  A lot of funny guesses.  

Try this game out for laughs and a good time.

developer_response.body: Laughs and a good time.. Life, quoi? Thanks!

reviews.review_description: What is this it’s so fun

developer_response.body: Well, it's a free multiplayer VR game, to meet your friends in VR and play-paint together. Yes, playpainting, that's what I said. It's so fresh, we even invented a new word for it. Thanks for the stars!

reviews.review_description:
"Trying to paint a unicorn head with a floppy multicoloured chicken toy is quite hard" is a sentence I never thought I would say.
Honestly try this game, it is fun to play around by yourself, and hilarious with the multiplayer

developer_response.body: but you did say it! And that what makes the game great :) Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Really fun drawing game to play with others and laugh! Hope the game gets big

developer_response.body: Redraw the lines to step over! :) Thanks!

reviews.review_description: The game is honestly so much fun, only complaint is that concepts are hard to draw. But I love it so much, definitely going to play a lot!!

developer_response.body: Ty! xxxxx STARS! The idea is also a bit that it is hard, but if you play it more than once, you'll see that you get good at something hard easily :)

reviews.review_description: Super fun game, had a lot of fun with friends. This game is perfect for pepole who like art and like multiplayer games!

developer_response.body: That is supernice of you! Thanks

reviews.review_description: I love the game! It's now one of my favorite art games :D

developer_response.body: That's great to hear! Thanks, and spread the word!

reviews.review_description: It's really good fun and relaxing game I believe that it can get better so when a funnier update comes out I will definitely change to 5 stars!

developer_response.body: 4 is great already too! Thanks
